overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in Western attire exploring a geothermal hot spring area in a mountainous prairie landscape. The character walks through tall grass, circles a vibrant turquoise pool, ventures toward distant grazing bison, and observes the stormy surroundings with steam vents visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie approaching geothermal hot spring

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to rocky mineral crust near the hot spring edge

agents.ego_description: walking through tall yellow grass toward the turquoise hot spring pool

entered.detail: circular turquoise geothermal pool with vibrant mineral deposits
active geyser emitting white steam into the air
mountain range with snow visible on peaks in the background
tall thin pine trees scattered across the landscape
decaying tree trunks lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open prairie with tall yellow grass under an overcast sky, approaching a vibrant turquoise geothermal hot spring. Steam rises from a distant geyser as the ground transitions from grass to rocky mineral crust near the pool's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring mineral crust edge

events.description: character begins circling around the right side of the hot spring pool
steam from the geyser becomes more prominent in the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: circling around the hot spring pool, observing the colorful mineral deposits and clear turquoise water

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the edge of the hot spring, walking on the yellow and orange mineral crust that surrounds the vivid turquoise water. Steam continues to rise from the geyser as the camera moves closer to the pool's edge.

events.description: character walks away from the hot spring into the open grassland
herd of bison becomes visible grazing in the distant field

agents.ego_description: walking away from the pool toward the open field with grazing animals in the distance

notable_agents.action: herd of bison grazing peacefully in the distant prairie

entered.detail: group of bison grazing in the distant grassy field
large rocks scattered throughout the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the hot spring behind and walks through the tall grass toward an open prairie where a herd of bison grazes in the distance. Large boulders dot the landscape as the character moves deeper into the field.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal pool overlook with storm clouds

events.description: dissolve transition returns to hot spring pool from a different vantage point
character stops observing and begins walking along the rocky pool edge

agents.ego_description: standing at the pool edge observing the deep turquoise water, then walking along the mineral crust rim

entered.detail: deep turquoise geothermal pool visible from elevated rocky edge
steep rocky cliff face with multiple steam vents

segments.scene_description: After a transition effect, the character stands at the edge of the hot spring from a new angle, looking down into the deep turquoise water. The character then walks along the rocky mineral crust edge as storm clouds gather overhead, with a rocky cliff and additional steam vents visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a mountainous prairie that shifts from a serene geothermal discovery to a brooding, storm-swept landscape. It begins with the character traversing wide-open fields of tall yellow grass under an overcast sky, moving toward a vibrant turquoise hot spring as the terrain transitions into a rocky mineral crust. As the camera circles the vivid pool, the character treads upon orange and yellow deposits while steam rises from a nearby geyser. The scene then expands back into the prairie, passing large boulders and moving toward a distant herd of grazing bison before shifting perspective to look deep into the turquoise waters once more. Finally, the camera tracks along the rocky edge of the spring as dark storm clouds gather overhead, revealing a rugged cliff and active steam vents in the background.
